theme_archetype.name: Electric & Neon (Modified for Premium JARVIS-vibe)
theme_archetype.description: Futuristic, elegant, minimal, and premium. Deep black backgrounds layered with glassmorphic cards and soft, radiating neon glows to indicate AI states.

rules: Use Space Grotesk for all headings, numbers, and the Voice Orb states.
Use Inter for all chat messages, descriptions, and body copy to maximize readability.
Never center-align body text; left-align for tech-precision feel.

VoiceOrb.description: The soul of the app. A central animated circle representing the AI's presence.

states.Idle: Gentle pulse, 80% opacity, slow scale (0.95 to 1.05).
states.Listening: Radiating concentric rings matching the primary neon color.
states.Thinking: Rotating particles or glowing border spinner.
states.Speaking: Dynamic waveform bars sprouting from the center or enveloping the orb.

VoiceOrb.implementation: Use React Native Reanimated or a Lottie file for fluid 60fps animations. Add a soft BoxShadow for the glow effect.

GlassCard.description: Used for modules, settings, and memory items.
GlassCard.blur: Requires expo-blur (BlurView) with 'dark' tint and high intensity, or a solid fallback #121212 if blur is not supported.
GlassCard.hover_active_state: On press, scale down to 0.98 and increase border opacity.

BottomTabNav.styles: absolute bottom-0 w-full h-24 bg-black/80 border-t border-white/10
BottomTabNav.active_state: Icon tinted to Primary Neon, glowing dot below the icon.

Button.primary: bg-[var(--primary)] text-black rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-bold text-lg tracking-wide
Button.secondary: bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-semibold

ChatBubble.ai: bg-transparent border border-white/10 p-4 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm w-[85%] self-start
ChatBubble.user: bg-[var(--primary)]/10 border border-[var(--primary)]/20 p-4 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm w-[85%] self-end
ChatBubble.model_badge: absolute -top-3 left-3 bg-black border border-white/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] text-white/70

Splash.layout: Centered AFIFA typography, space-grotesk, large. Below it, an animated glowing waveform line. Pure black background.

Onboarding.layout: Stepper. Top: Progress dots. Center: Large expressive typography + subtle background glow. Bottom: Primary action button.

Home_Dashboard.bottom: Horizontal scroll or 2x2 grid of 'Frequent Modules' (GlassCards) overlapping the bottom of the screen.

Chat.footer: Glassmorphic input bar + Attachment Icon (left) + Voice Mic/Send Icon (right).

Voice_Overlay.layout: Full screen semi-transparent black backdrop (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md). Massive active Voice Orb in the center with waveform. Live transcription text below it.

Modules_Grid.layout: SafeAreaView. 'All Capabilities' Header. 3x4 or 2x6 Grid of square GlassCards. Each card has a Lucide Icon and a label.

Memory_Center.layout: Search bar at top. Filter chips (Conversations, Notes, Projects). Vertical list of memory GlassCards (Title, date, summary snippet).

Settings_Theme.layout: List view. 'Appearance' section features horizontal scroll of Theme preset circles. Tapping one instantly updates the CSS variables across the app.

Profile.layout: Avatar/Voice Profile at top. AI Name display. Preferences list (Language, Security PIN/Fingerprint).

Generic_Module_Detail.layout: Standardized internal screen. Top App Bar with Back arrow and Module Title. Content area specific to the module (e.g., Job Assistant inputs, Document Generator forms).

icons.rules: Use strokeWidth=1.5. Tint icons with pure white or Primary Neon depending on active state. Absolutely NO emojis.

backgrounds.description: Abstract dark blue neon lines, can be used at very low opacity for splash or empty states.
Futuristic technology data. Use as a header background for the 'Coding Assistant' or 'Automation Center' module.
Dynamic blue light streaks. Excellent for the Onboarding setup complete screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native (Expo) app. Use NativeWind or StyleSheet for styling.
Implement the Theme system using React Context and dynamic CSS variables or a theme provider to allow instant swapping between the 6 presets.
For the Voice Orb, prioritize React Native Reanimated to ensure 60fps performance without JavaScript thread blocking.
Ensure all text elements over dark backgrounds meet at least WCAG AA contrast standards.
Use 'expo-blur' for the GlassCard components to achieve the premium iOS/Android frosted glass effect.
Apply `data-testid` to all touchables, inputs, and navigation elements.
Keep gradients to an absolute minimum. Rely on deep blacks, sharp 1px borders, and soft BoxShadow glows.
